meta.title: PicoMUTX — From first agent to one you actually trust
meta.description: PicoMUTX is the guided academy, tutor, and autopilot layer that takes you from first agent to a production workflow you can actually trust.

hero.title: Build one useful agent,
hero.titleAccent: then learn how to trust it.
hero.subtitle: PicoMUTX helps you get a real agent live without losing control. You get guided steps, grounded help, and a control layer that helps you catch cost leaks, stop bad automation, and understand what happened.
hero.meta: Open workspace now · Know when something breaks · Prevent bad actions

items.0: For founders, operators, and small teams

problem.title: The problem is not the idea.
problem.titleLine2: It is everything that happens after it.
problem.body: Most people do not get stuck because they lack ambition. They get stuck because building an AI agent still feels like entering a world designed by engineers, for engineers.

0.label: "I want an AI agent, but I don't know where to start."
0.body: There are too many tools, too many opinions, and too many people assuming you already know the basics. The gap between "I have an idea" and "I have something working" feels larger than it should.

1.label: "I already tried — and got stuck."
1.body: You made progress, hit a wall, and had nobody to ask who could actually help. The idea is sitting in your backlog instead of creating value.

2.label: "I spent money, and it still isn't working properly."
2.body: Maybe you hired someone. Maybe you paid for tools. Now you are not just uncertain — you are skeptical.

3.label: "I don't want to deploy something I can't trust."
3.body: An agent that gives the wrong answer, behaves unpredictably, or creates hidden costs is not an asset. It is a liability.

platform.title: Build the agent. Keep control.
platform.body: PicoMUTX is for people who want a useful agent without blind execution. You get a clear path, grounded help, and a control layer that helps you catch cost leaks, stop bad automation, and understand bad runs fast.

0.title: Build with a clear path
0.body: Follow one path. Ship one useful agent. Skip the wandering.

1.title: Know when something breaks
1.body: When a run fails or drifts, you see it fast instead of finding out later.

2.title: Prevent bad actions
2.body: Put a gate in front of risky sends, spend, and other moves you do not want an agent making alone.

3.title: Understand what happened
3.body: Keep the trail you need to explain a bad run, fix it, and move on.

who.title: PicoMUTX is not for everyone.
who.notForYouTitle: This is not for you if…

forYou.0: You want to build an AI agent but don't want to depend entirely on developers
forYou.1: You've tried before and got stuck halfway
forYou.2: You already spent money on tools or implementation and still don't trust the outcome
forYou.3: You want a practical path, not more theory
forYou.4: You want support while building, not only after something goes wrong

notForYou.0: You are looking for a shortcut with zero learning
notForYou.1: You already run a mature enterprise agent stack and need complex governance infrastructure
notForYou.2: You want entertainment, trends, or hype more than execution
notForYou.3: You are not ready to change how the business actually operates
notForYou.4: You expect AI to replace judgment, leadership, or accountability

beforeAfter.title: What you are really buying

0.before: You hope the agent is fine

3.before: A bad run turns into guesswork

beforeAfter.close: That is the point. More control. Less surprise.

earlyAccess.title: The product is live. So is the control layer.
earlyAccess.body: Open the workspace, follow the lessons, and use real signals to catch cost leaks, stop risky actions, and understand bad runs before they turn expensive.

benefits.1: Follow guided onboarding and academy tracks
benefits.3: Prevent bad actions before they land
benefits.4: Get a human when the edge case is ugly

faq.title: Questions people usually have before joining

0.q: Do I need to know how to code?
0.a: No. PicoMUTX is built for people who want to build useful AI agents without needing deep technical expertise.

1.q: What if I've already tried and failed?
1.a: That is exactly one of the people this is for. PicoMUTX is designed to reduce the confusion and fragmentation that usually cause people to stop halfway.

2.q: What kind of agents can I build?
2.a: Practical ones — the kind that save time, support operations, improve workflows, and help businesses run better. The focus is usefulness, not toy demos.

3.q: Can I use the workspace now?
3.a: Yes. The beta product is live. Use the workspace, follow the lessons, and contact the team if you need a human hand on a messy edge case.

4.q: What am I really paying for?
4.a: Control and peace of mind. Knowing when something breaks, stopping risky actions before they land, and having the trail you need to understand what happened.

finalCta.title: What you want is control and peace of mind.
finalCta.body: Fewer surprises. Fewer expensive mistakes. A clear trail when something breaks. That is what PicoMUTX is for.
finalCta.formSubline: Tell us what needs control: cost leaks, risky actions, or blind spots. We will point you to the right path.
finalCta.formCtaMeta: Open workspace now · Real control signals · Human reply when needed
